title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate by 0.97% in a day, the main contract closed 832.5. The spot quotation in the morning almostkept steady. PBF at Shandong port dealt 940-955 yuan/mt; decreased 5-15 yuan/mt from last Friday.
